Functions to enable or disable Bluetooth LE and classic pairability.

# Purpose
This C source code file defines two functions related to Bluetooth pairability settings. The function [`bt_driver_le_pairability_set_enabled`](<#bt_driver_le_pairability_set_enabled>) is intended to enable or disable pairability for Bluetooth Low Energy (LE) devices based on the boolean parameter `enabled`. Similarly, the function [`bt_driver_classic_pairability_set_enabled`](<#bt_driver_classic_pairability_set_enabled>) is designed to control the pairability of classic Bluetooth devices using the same parameter. Both functions are currently empty, indicating that the implementation logic for enabling or disabling pairability is not yet provided. The file includes the header `bluetooth/pairability.h`, which likely contains necessary declarations or dependencies for these functions.
